title: Compose contract test missing adversarial coverage for default-fallback bind on smackerel-core/ml

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects smackerel-core with ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}: default-fallback bind
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `smackerel-core` AND at least one of [spec 020, ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}, Gate-G028, fail-loud]; the test docstring carries HL-RESCAN-009 attribution
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go new TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind function (pre-fix had no adversarial coverage for the default-fallback form on smackerel-core)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind$' ./internal/deploy/... covers the smackerel-core sub-case
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the smackerel-core prefix check in assertComposeContract is relaxed from strings.HasPrefix to a too-loose substring like strings.Contains

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects smackerel-ml with ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}: default-fallback bind
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `smackerel-ml` AND at least one of [spec 020, ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}, Gate-G028, fail-loud]
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go new TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind function (pre-fix had no adversarial coverage for the default-fallback form on smackerel-ml)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind$' ./internal/deploy/... covers the smackerel-ml default-fallback sub-case
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the smackerel-ml prefix check in assertComposeContract is relaxed

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects smackerel-ml with literal 127.0.0.1: bind (spec 020 form)
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `smackerel-ml` AND at least one of [spec 020, ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}, Gate-G028, fail-loud]; the smackerel-core branch is unaffected (positive cross-check)
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go new TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind function (pre-fix had no adversarial coverage for the literal 127.0.0.1: form on smackerel-ml; only smackerel-core literal-bind was covered by TestComposeContract_AdversarialLiteralBind)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestComposeContract_AdversarialDefaultFallbackBind$' ./internal/deploy/... covers the smackerel-ml literal sub-case
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the smackerel-ml prefix check in assertComposeContract is relaxed
